aboutHotel.legalInformationDescription: This property is managed by a private host.</br></br>EU law relating to professional hosts may not apply here.</br></br>Hosts who have registered with Agoda as a private host are parties that rent out their property or properties for purposes which are outside their trade, business, or profession. They are not officially traders (like a global chain) and therefore may not fall under the same consumer protection rules under EU law, but don't worry. Agoda provides you with the same customer service as we do with any stay. This doesn't mean that your stay or experience will be any different than booking with a professional host.
aboutHotel.nswCodeOfConductDescription: The New South Wales Government has issued a mandatory {0} applying to short-term rental accommodations (“STRAs”). The code of conduct includes the rights and obligations of those hosting STRAs and those permitted to use STRAs as guests, in addition to a complaints process.

roomRateCategoryOverlay.feeType0: When cancelling all nights of a multi-night reservation, the cancellation fee for the first night of the reservation will apply for all nights, calculated as indicated above.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.feeType1: When cancelling all nights of a multi-night reservation, cancellation fees will apply for each night individually, calculated as indicated above.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.feeType2: When cancelling all nights of a multi-night reservation, cancellation fees will only apply for the first night, calculated as indicated above.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.additionalNoticeHR:
・取引条件説明書面は、画面上の表示（HTML）をもって交付させていただきます。
・予約・購入情報確認画面のあとに表示される、予約・購入完了画面の表示をもって、旅行契約が成立するものとさせていただきます。
※予約の受付は株式会社JTBが行います
roomRateCategoryOverlay.typeOfContractOTARurubu: ・本ご旅行の契約は、お客様と宿泊施設が締結する契約となります。[契約について](https://www.rurubu.travel/content/faq/#1-16)
roomRateCategoryOverlay.typeOfContractHR: 本ご旅行の契約は、お客様と株式会社JTBが締結する手配旅行契約となります。[手配旅行契約について](https://www.rurubu.travel/content/faq/#1-19)
roomRateCategoryOverlay.termsAndConditionsOTARurubu:
・旅行の手配について
本ご旅行の契約はお客様と宿泊施設が締結する宿泊約款に基づく契約となります。
こちらのお申し込みは[ご利用規約](https://www.rurubu.travel/content/terms-of-use/)が適用になります。お申込み前に必ずご覧下さい。
ご本人様の利用を確認させていただく為に、ご連絡をさせていただく場合がございますのでご了承下さい。
roomRateCategoryOverlay.termsAndConditionsHR:
・旅行の手配について
本ご旅行の契約は、[旅行業約款（手配旅行契約の部）](https://www.rurubu.travel/content/yakkan)に基づきお引き受けする旅行であり、お客様と当社が締結する[手配旅行契約](https://www.rurubu.travel/content/jyoken/)となります。
お申込み前に必ずご旅行条件書をご覧ください。
roomRateCategoryOverlay.minimumAgeOTARurubu:
・未成年（20歳未満）の方の予約について（宿泊）
ご宿泊者が未成年（20歳未満）で保護者が同行しない場合、保護者の同意が必要です。必ず施設へご連絡ください。ご連絡がない場合、宿泊できないことがあります。
また、宿泊施設によっては未成年者だけの宿泊をお断りすることもありますので、何卒ご了承ください。
roomRateCategoryOverlay.minimumAgeHR: なお15歳未満の未成年の方は、保護者または親権者のご同行が必要です。
roomRateCategoryOverlay.beddingAdultMeal: Bedding and, if the offer includes meals, adult meals (reduced portions/items) provided.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.beddingSpecialChildrenMeal: Bedding and, if the offer includes meals, special children's meals provided.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.beddingOnly: Small children. Bedding only. No meals provided.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.noBedding: Infants. No bedding or meals provided.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.childPolicyPercentageDisclaimer: Prices expressed as a percentage are based on the adult rate.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.childPolicyListingDisclaimer: ※Due to the limited number of listings, we may get no search results when using some child categories. In such cases, the superior child category or the adult fare will be used when calculating your price.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.stayLengthRule1: When cancelling only part of a multi-night reservation, a cancellation fee will apply for one night, calculated as indicated above based on the first night of the reservation.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.stayLengthRule2: When cancelling only part of a multi-night reservation, cancellation fees will apply for each cancelled night individually, calculated as indicated above.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.stayLengthRule3: When cancelling only part of a multi-night reservation, no cancellation fees will apply.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.stayLengthRule4: Please contact Customer Support to inquire about cancellation fees when cancelling only part of a multi-night reservation.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.guestSizeRule1: When cancelling only some of the guests on a reservation, no cancellation fees will apply.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.guestSizeRule2: When cancelling only some of the guests on a reservation for 15 or more people, a cancellation fee will not be charged for up to 10% of the number of guests as of ten days before the check-in date (rounded up). In addition, when cancelling for only some guests for a booking with less than 15 guests, no cancellation fee will be charged. If the booking was made less than ten days before the check-in date, the number of guests will be calculated based on the number of guests on the date the reservation was completed.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.guestSizeRule3: When cancelling only some of the guests on a reservation, cancellation fees will apply for each cancelled guest, calculated as indicated above.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.guestSizeRule4: Please contact Customer Support to inquire about cancellation fees for cancelling only some of the guests on a reservation.
roomRateCategoryOverlay.groupsAmendmentOTARurubu: 同じお客様が同一宿泊施設の同一宿泊日に複数回ご予約され、合計で団体人数になった場合は、該当する団体人数の取消料規定を適用させて頂きます。
roomRateCategoryOverlay.propertyChargeDirectlyAmendmentOTARurubu: 取消料の発生するお取消の場合は、宿泊施設よりお客様にご請求させていただきますのでご了承下さい。

address.full: No.55 Renmin Rd Zhongshan District, Ren Min Road Business District, Dalian, China, 116001

hotelDesc.overview:
Experience Comfort and Convenience at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Welcome to Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment, a 4-star hotel located in the vibrant city of Dalian, China. With its prime location just 1 kilometer away from the city center, this hotel offers a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and accessibility. Built in 2003 and last renovated in 2012, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment features 104 well-appointed rooms that are designed to provide a relaxing and enjoyable stay for both business and leisure travelers. Each room is tastefully decorated with modern furnishings and equipped with all the essential amenities to ensure a comfortable stay. Check-in time at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment starts from 02:00 PM, allowing you to settle in and start your Dalian adventure at your own pace. Whether you're arriving by air or train, the hotel's convenient location ensures that you can reach your destination with ease. The hotel is only 30 minutes away from the airport, making it a convenient choice for travelers. Families traveling with children will be pleased to know that Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment has a child-friendly policy. Children between the ages of 3 to 16 can stay free of charge, allowing you to create lasting memories with your loved ones without any additional cost. The hotel understands the importance of family and strives to provide a comfortable and enjoyable experience for guests of all ages. Check-out time is until 12:00 PM, giving you ample time to wrap up your stay and bid farewell to the welcoming staff of Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment. Whether you're in Dalian for business or pleasure, this hotel offers a convenient location, comfortable accommodations, and a warm hospitality that will make your stay truly memorable.

Unwind and Indulge in Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment's Entertainment Facilities

Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment goes above and beyond to ensure that guests have a truly unforgettable stay. In addition to its convenient location near shops and a salon, the hotel also boasts an impressive array of entertainment facilities. Whether you're looking to relax or have some fun, there's something for everyone here. Step into the shared lounge/TV area and immerse yourself in a world of entertainment. Catch up on your favorite shows or movies on the large flat-screen TV, or simply unwind on the comfortable sofas while enjoying a good book. The lounge provides the perfect setting to socialize with fellow guests or simply enjoy some downtime. For those seeking a bit more excitement, the hotel offers a range of recreational activities. Challenge your friends to a game of billiards or table tennis in the dedicated game room, where friendly competition and laughter fill the air. If you prefer a more laid-back experience, head to the karaoke room and unleash your inner rockstar with a private singing session. No matter what your idea of entertainment is, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment has you covered. With its exceptional facilities, you're guaranteed to have a memorable and enjoyable stay.

Stay Active at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment's Fitness Center

Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is the perfect choice for fitness enthusiasts looking to maintain their active lifestyle while traveling. The hotel boasts a state-of-the-art fitness center equipped with top-of-the-line exercise machines and equipment. Whether you prefer cardio workouts or strength training, you'll find everything you need to stay in shape during your stay. The spacious fitness center at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment offers a variety of machines, including treadmills, stationary bikes, and elliptical trainers. With these options, guests can choose their preferred form of cardiovascular exercise, whether it be a brisk run, a challenging bike ride, or a low-impact elliptical workout. Additionally, the fitness center features a wide range of weightlifting equipment, allowing guests to target specific muscle groups and build strength. The fitness center at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is open 24 hours, ensuring that guests can work out at their convenience. The hotel also provides complimentary towels and water bottles, making it easy for guests to stay hydrated and refreshed during their workout. With its modern facilities and convenient amenities, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is the ideal destination for fitness enthusiasts seeking a comfortable and active stay in Dalian, China.

Convenience Facilities at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment offers a comprehensive range of convenience facilities designed to enhance your stay. Guests can enjoy the ease of express check-in and check-out, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free arrival and departure experience. For added security and peace of mind, safety deposit boxes are available, allowing guests to securely store their valuables. Stay connected effortlessly with free Wi-Fi available in all rooms and public areas, making it easy to work or browse during your stay. The apartment also provides practical amenities such as a laundromat, laundry service, and daily housekeeping to keep your living space clean and comfortable. For those with luggage or travel plans, luggage storage is available to accommodate your needs. Whether you're here for business or leisure, these thoughtful facilities ensure a convenient, comfortable, and worry-free stay at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment.

Convenient Transport Facilities at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment offers guests the convenience of a secure and accessible onsite car park, allowing for hassle-free parking during your stay. Whether you're arriving by car or planning to explore the vibrant city of Dalian, the complimentary parking ensures easy access to your transportation needs. For added convenience, the apartment also provides reliable taxi services, making it simple to get around town and reach your desired destinations comfortably and efficiently. With these well-equipped transport facilities, guests can enjoy a seamless travel experience, whether commuting locally or embarking on excursions beyond the city.

Comfort and Convenience at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Indulge in a world of comfort and convenience at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment. Each room is thoughtfully designed to provide a luxurious and relaxing stay for our guests. Stay cool and refreshed with the air conditioning, ensuring a pleasant temperature throughout your stay. Wrap yourself in plush bathrobes, adding a touch of luxury to your daily routine. For entertainment, enjoy a wide selection of in-house movies, perfect for a cozy night in. Stay stylish and well-groomed with the hair dryer provided in each room. Catch up on your favorite shows or stay updated with the latest news on the television with satellite/cable TV channels. At Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment, we understand the importance of a comfortable and enjoyable stay. With our exceptional room facilities, you can rest assured that your needs will be met, leaving you with unforgettable memories of your stay in Dalian, China.

Comfort and Convenience with Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment's Dining Facilities

Start your day with a satisfying continental breakfast served daily at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment, offering a variety of fresh and delicious options to energize your morning. Whether you prefer a light, healthy meal or a more hearty start, the breakfast provides a convenient and tasty way to begin your day. The apartment's attentive staff ensures that your dining experience is comfortable and hassle-free, allowing you to focus on your plans ahead. In addition to its breakfast offerings, the property provides daily housekeeping services that keep your living space clean and well-maintained, creating a comfortable environment for your stay. While the apartment does not feature on-site dining venues, the focus on daily housekeeping and a wholesome continental breakfast ensures guests enjoy a cozy, convenient, and home-like atmosphere during their visit to Dalian.

Spacious and Luxurious Rooms at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Indulge in the spacious and luxurious rooms at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment. Choose from a variety of room types, including the 1 Bedroom Deluxe, 1 Bedroom Executive, 2 Bedroom Deluxe Apartment, 2 Bedroom Executive, 2 Bedroom Premier, Executive Suite, and Studio Executive. These rooms offer ample space ranging from 65 to 143 square meters, ensuring a comfortable stay for all guests. With options of queen beds, single beds, or a combination of both, you can find the perfect accommodation to suit your needs.

Experience the Vibrant Ren Min Road Business District in Dalian

Nestled in the heart of Dalian, China, the Ren Min Road Business District is a bustling and vibrant area that offers an exciting blend of business, shopping, and entertainment. With its strategic location, this district is a popular choice for both business travelers and tourists seeking a dynamic city experience. Ren Min Road itself is a major thoroughfare that runs through the district, lined with an array of high-end shops, trendy boutiques, and department stores. Here, you can indulge in a shopping spree, exploring the latest fashion trends or hunting for unique souvenirs to take home. The district is also known for its diverse dining scene, offering a wide range of local and international cuisines to satisfy every palate. Beyond the shopping and dining options, the Ren Min Road Business District is home to several iconic landmarks and cultural attractions. The Dalian People's Square, located at the heart of the district, is a popular gathering spot for locals and visitors alike. This expansive square features beautiful gardens, fountains, and sculptures, providing a serene escape from the bustling city streets. For those seeking entertainment, the district is dotted with theaters, cinemas, and performance venues, offering a variety of shows, concerts, and cultural events throughout the year. Whether you're in the mood for a night of live music, a theatrical performance, or a blockbuster movie, the Ren Min Road Business District has something to offer. With its vibrant atmosphere, diverse attractions, and convenient location, the Ren Min Road Business District is the perfect place to immerse yourself in the energy and excitement of Dalian. Whether you're visiting for business or pleasure, this dynamic district is sure to leave a lasting impression.

Convenient Transportation from Dalian Airport to Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Located in the bustling Ren Min Road Business District, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment offers a convenient and comfortable stay for travelers visiting Dalian, China. When it comes to getting to the apartment from the airport, there are a few transportation options to consider. The nearest airport to Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is Dalian Zhoushuizi International Airport, which is approximately 10 kilometers away. From the airport, travelers can easily reach the apartment by taking a taxi or using public transportation. Taxis are readily available at the airport and offer a hassle-free and direct journey to the apartment. The journey takes around 30 minutes, depending on the traffic conditions. For those who prefer public transportation, there is a subway station located near the airport. Travelers can take Line 2 from Dalian Zhoushuizi International Airport Station to Ren Min Road Station, which is just a short walk away from Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment. The subway journey takes approximately 40 minutes, providing a convenient and cost-effective option for travelers. Overall, whether you choose to take a taxi or use public transportation, reaching Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment from Dalian Zhoushuizi International Airport is a straightforward and hassle-free process. With its prime location in the heart of the city's business district, the apartment offers easy access to nearby attractions, shopping centers, and dining options, making it an ideal choice for both business and leisure travelers.

Explore the Vibrant Surroundings of Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Situated in the heart of Dalian, China, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment offers easy access to a plethora of exciting landmarks and attractions. Just a stone's throw away from the hotel, you will find the iconic Dalian Zhongshan Square. This historic square is adorned with beautiful sculptures and fountains, making it the perfect place for a leisurely stroll or a peaceful picnic. For those interested in immersing themselves in the local culture, the Japanese Style Street of Dalian is a must-visit. Located nearby, this vibrant street is lined with traditional Japanese-style buildings, charming shops, and delectable restaurants. Indulge in authentic Japanese cuisine, shop for unique souvenirs, or simply soak in the lively atmosphere. Sports enthusiasts will be delighted to discover the Dalian People Stadium, which is just a short distance from the hotel. This modern stadium hosts various sporting events throughout the year, providing an exciting opportunity to catch a thrilling match or cheer on your favorite team. In addition to these landmarks, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is conveniently located near Zhongshan Square, LaoJie, Dalian World Trade Building, Yuguang Street Church, The World Trade Mansion Observation Deck of Dalian, Dalian Harbour, and Youhao Square. With such a diverse range of attractions within close proximity, guests are guaranteed an unforgettable stay filled with exploration and adventure.

Shop 'til you drop at Dalian's premier shopping destinations

Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is surrounded by an array of shopping landmarks that will satisfy even the most avid shopaholics. Just a short distance away, you'll find the Friendship Shopping Center on Renmin road, where you can explore a variety of stores offering everything from fashion and accessories to electronics and home decor. For a unique shopping experience, head to the City of Wenzhou commodity trading Market, which boasts 27 stores selling a wide range of goods. If you're looking for a modern shopping complex, look no further than 38 Mall, where you can indulge in retail therapy at its finest. The Dalian Friendship Building is another must-visit destination, offering a mix of local and international brands. For a taste of Tianjin's vibrant shopping scene, make your way to Tianjin Walking Street, where you'll find a plethora of shops, boutiques, and street vendors. Century city Plaza is a shopper's paradise, featuring a diverse selection of high-end fashion brands and luxury goods. And if you're in search of entertainment and shopping under one roof, Dalian Time Square is the place to be, with its extensive range of shops, restaurants, and entertainment options. With these incredible shopping landmarks just moments away, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is the perfect base for a shopping getaway in Dalian, China.

Affordable Luxury at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment

Experience the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and affordability at Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment. With an average price of just $62 per room, this luxurious accommodation offers exceptional value for money in comparison to the average price of a hotel room in Dalian, which stands at $80. At Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment, you can indulge in a range of modern amenities and services without breaking the bank. Each spacious room is elegantly furnished and equipped with all the essentials for a comfortable stay. Whether you are traveling for business or leisure, you will find everything you need right at your fingertips, including complimentary Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV, a fully equipped kitchenette, and a private bathroom. Located in the heart of Dalian, this apartment complex is surrounded by a plethora of dining, shopping, and entertainment options. With its unbeatable price and prime location, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is the perfect choice for budget-conscious travelers who refuse to compromise on quality. Book your stay today and discover the true meaning of affordable luxury in Dalian.

Excellent Service and Great Facilities

Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment in Dalian, China, has received rave reviews from its customers. With a staff that is not only nice and friendly but also extremely helpful, guests have praised their excellent command of the English language, making communication a breeze. The hotel's central location is another highlight, allowing guests to easily explore the city's attractions. The facilities provided by the hotel are top-notch, with spacious rooms that come equipped with functional kitchens and utensils. The availability of a washer+drier is an added convenience for guests. The hotel's wifi is reliable, ensuring that guests can stay connected throughout their stay. Furthermore, the quiet ambiance of the hotel is appreciated, as it allows guests to enjoy a peaceful and undisturbed experience. With reasonable prices and a satisfying breakfast, Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is the perfect choice for a comfortable and enjoyable stay in Dalian.

One of the standout features of Dalian Asia Pacific Service Apartment is its exceptional value for money, scoring an impressive 8.4 in this category.
